parsed_json.rationale: The effective record TIME-BAP-001 starts at 2026-06-17 10:45, which is after the queued release timestamp of 10:30. The timing matching standard MATCH-BAP-001 explicitly requires the effective record to start before the queued release timestamp, and NOTE-BAP-001 confirms same-day records require explicit timestamp ordering. All other fields match correctly (account, source object, program), but the temporal sequence is invalid.
parsed_json.evidence_binding_gap: The effective record start time (10:45) is 15 minutes after the queued release time (10:30), violating the before-queued-release prerequisite. The closing record cannot be used as-is for this release.
